play_order_init: switch on DS:519C (0=Random
case 0 Random: fill order array sequentially then Fisher-Yates shuffle 50 swaps + random(2) start
case 1 Losers-First: fill+shuffle then rotate start via DS:51A4 tracking (player_id+1 next round)
case 2 Winners-First: sort by score + fill order in REVERSE (highest first) + random start
case 3 Round-Robin: sort by score + fill order FORWARD (lowest first) + random start
PLAY_ORDER: enum 0-4 (Random/Losers-First/Winners-First/Round-Robin/Sequential)
PLAY_ORDER_LAST_STARTER: tracks first player's ID (struct+0xA0) for Losers-First rotation
